title: Brain Region Mapping
hint: Click a colored region on the brain
guideStudy: Click any lobe on the brain (or a button) to learn its job. Try all 6 regions!
guideQuiz: Read the question, then click the matching brain region. Wrong answers show the right one.
guideCorrect: Nice! Keep going — next question is ready.
guideWrong: Not that one — the hint names the correct region. Try again!
learnMore: Cerebrum = thinking & senses · Cerebellum = balance · Brain stem = automatic life functions
